title: Do Not Tilt The Camera In Relation To Damage Direction
description: Don't tilt the camera in the direction of damage in >=1.19.4
body:
Mojang """fixed""" the "camera wobble" in 1.19.4 to wobble in proportion to the direction of the damage being received, thus restoring a functionality lost in Minecraft 1.2.3.

Personally I find this new wobble sickening. This mod restores the wobble of Minecraft 1.2.3 - 1.19.3.
